_readme: PHASE 3d FIELD cycle (ladder6, WARM-START arm): the SINGLE lever is the TRAINING FIELD, not the reward. ladders 4+5 proved potential-based shaping (status penalty OR attackPower credit) is policy-invariant and cannot move the low-attack VP-optimal policy while the learner only ever faces weak heuristics + self-mirror — the fast low-attack corrupt line stays optimal, so the attack gap (~-3 vs strong play) and vpClassAwake (0%) never budged. FIX: heuristicOpponentFraction 0.4 seats a PURE PARAGON/INSANE field in 40% of training matchups so a weak engine ACTUALLY LOSES and building one becomes VP-optimal + learnable. Field mix: mirror 0.35 (selfPlayFraction kept) + heuristic-field 0.40 + PFSP 0.25. Shaping (ascend3), temp anneal (1.0->0.65/40), obs v1.2, gauntlet-v8 ALL kept IDENTICAL to ladder5 to isolate the field change. evalOpponents lead with paragon+insane so per-gen eval tracks the strong field (where 'weak engine loses' is visible). promoteMarginElo lowered 25->10 (ladder5 gen36/gen60 both missed promotion by 1 Elo). WARM-START from ladder5 gen60 (already 83-dim, obs v1.2). LAUNCH DECISION: run this warm arm first; if the attack-gap probe is STILL flat by ~gen 15, pivot to the from-scratch arm (ladder6_scratch) — warm starts have stayed in the low-attack basin both prior cycles, scratch may escape it once the field rewards a strong engine.
